Bay Isla Capital Holdings, Inc. — Internal Compliance Memo (Confidential; for Board circulation)
Subject: SRC Rule 17 and PSE disclosure readiness; HR/tax data handling for Q3 follow-on offering
From: Atty. Renato D. Silang, Chief Compliance Officer; Contact: legal@bayislacapital.com.ph, +63 990 123 7788
SEC Reg. No.: CS2023-091234; TIN: 345-678-912-000; Registered office: 18/F Cayanan Tower, 1256 Liyab St., Brgy. San Ibon, Makati City, Metro Manila
Proposed transaction (MNPI): Board approved a PHP 2.4B follow-on offering on the PSE with target pricing window 12–16 June; no Form 17-C disclosure has been filed.
Draft term sheet includes unaudited EBITDA guidance for FY2026 and a standby purchase by Mabini Logistics Corp. (non-public); blackout list to be updated.
Employee data collected for insider lists include Mr. Jaime O. Laraya, Passport No.: P1234567, PhilSys PSN: 1234-5678-9012, SSS No.: 33-1234567-0, and corporate email jolaraya@bayislacapital.com.ph.
Payroll vendor requires BIR TIN for select secondees; sample TIN on form 1902 shows 000-000-000-000 and is not to be treated as a live identifier.
Treasury to open escrow at Sampaguita Bank – Makati Branch; temporary Account No.: 0012-345-678-901 for settlement testing; do not fund until SEC clearance.
HR contact for tax onboarding: hr@bayislacapital.com.ph; Public Helpline: 1800-1-234-5678 (general inquiries only, not linked to any employee record).
Role-only entries in prior access logs (e.g., “Procurement Manager”, “IT Admin”) are not sufficient under the Data Privacy Act; names must be directly ascertainable.
Note that “Name: __________” and “ID No.: __________” fields in legacy forms are generic placeholders and shall be redacted before external counsel review.
External sharing of draft MD&A, earnings bridge, and preliminary order book indications remains restricted; any leak would be material to a reasonable investor.
For related-party review, Ms. Lila M. Quisan (Director) disclosed Pag-IBIG MID: 12-345678901-2 and PhilHealth No.: 17-123456789-3 for benefits updates; store per policy.
Investor Relations may use the public website and press@bayislacapital.com.ph for backgrounders, but must avoid referencing the PSE ticker or tentative offer size until 17-C is posted.
